mapper.select: select r.*, e.name as examName, s.name as studentName from `exam_recording` r left join `exam` e on r.exam_id = e.id left join `student` s on r.student_id = s.id where r.exam_id = #{examId} order by r.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into `exam_recording`
id, exam_id, student_id, record_id, file_url, file_size, duration, switch_count, status,
#{id}, #{examId}, #{studentId}, #{recordId}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{duration}, #{switchCount}, #{status},
